meta.title: Skylar India Solar Energy — MNRE Certified Solar, Kheda Gujarat
meta.description: Gujarat's #1 MNRE-certified solar installer. Get ₹78,000 PM Surya Ghar subsidy. Residential, agricultural & commercial solar in Kheda, Anand, Nadiad. Book a free survey today.

hero.badge: 🏛️ Govt. Approved • MNRE Certified • Kheda, Gujarat
hero.tagline: Gujarat's most trusted solar installer — Homes, Farms & Businesses installed in 1–3 days.
hero.subsidy_sub: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana

subsidy.label: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
subsidy.title: Get Up To ₹78,000 Government Subsidy
subsidy.subtitle: Direct to your bank account. No middlemen. We handle the entire application for you.
subsidy.extra: Gujarat State Additional Subsidy: ₹10,000/kW extra on top of central subsidy
subsidy.note: 300 free electricity units every month worth ~₹2,400

items.title: Residential Solar
items.desc: 1–10 kW rooftop solar for your home. Cut your electricity bill by up to 90% and earn money by exporting to the grid.

items.title: Agricultural Solar Pump
items.desc: PM-KUSUM solar pumps with 60–90% government subsidy. Irrigate your fields for free — zero diesel, zero electricity cost.

items.title: Commercial & Industrial
items.desc: Factory, school, hospital or shop — on-grid or hybrid systems with 40% accelerated depreciation benefit.

items.title: Zero Electricity Bill
items.desc: Most customers pay ₹0–₹200/month after going solar.

items.title: Earn From Your Roof
items.desc: Sell surplus power back to grid via net metering and earn credits.

items.title: Save the Environment
items.desc: Each 3 kW system offsets ~3.6 tonnes of CO₂ per year.

items.title: Increase Property Value
items.desc: Solar-powered homes sell for 10–15% more in Gujarat market.

items.title: Installed in 1–3 Days
items.desc: Our expert team completes installation fast with zero disruption.

items.title: Lifetime Support
items.desc: 24/7 monitoring and dedicated support for 25 full years.

process.label: How It Works
process.title: From Survey to Savings in 4 Easy Steps

steps.title: Book Free Survey
steps.desc: Our expert visits your site, checks your roof and electricity bill, and designs the best solar system for you.

steps.title: Subsidy Application
steps.desc: We handle your PM Surya Ghar application on the government portal — no paperwork stress for you.

steps.title: Professional Install
steps.desc: Certified technicians install your system in 1–3 days using top-quality panels and inverters.

steps.title: Start Saving Money
steps.desc: Your net meter goes live, subsidy hits your bank account, and your electricity bill drops to near zero.

items.name: Ramubhai Patel
items.text: ₹78,000 subsidy was processed in just 3 weeks. My electricity bill dropped from ₹3,500 to under ₹200 every month. Best decision of my life!

items.name: Bhaveshbhai Desai
items.text: PM-KUSUM pump installed for my farm. My diesel cost of ₹80,000 per year is now completely zero. Skylar's team handled everything.

items.name: Manishbhai Shah
items.text: Installed 10 kW on my factory. The 40% depreciation benefit in the first year itself covered most of the cost. ROI in under 5 years!

contact.label: Get Started
contact.title: Book Your Free Survey
